title: Indulgent Charred Syrian Eggplant Skewers
description: This indulgent Syrian dish features charred eggplant skewers with a fluffy interior, made with dark soy sauce and broiled to perfection, perfect for vegetarians. It is a flavorful and satisfying meal that is sure to please.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the eggplant cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
In a large bowl, whisk together the dark soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the eggplant skewers to the bowl and toss to coat with the soy sauce mixture.
Place the skewers on a broiler pan and broil for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
